few_shot_examples.question: What is total revenue by region?
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT region, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

few_shot_examples.question: How many employees are in each department?
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(*) AS employee_count FROM employees e JOIN departments d ON d.id = e.department_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY employee_count DESC;
